<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get turf details"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/user/turf/details/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns full information about a specific turf including facilities and rules.
